name: Alec Baldwin
abstract: Alexander Rae Baldwin III (born April 3, 1958) is an American actor and film producer. He is known for his leading and supporting roles in a variety of genres, from comedy to drama.

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Shorter
about_quotes.evidence: Maybe some of them heard that I got a doctorate at NYU, at the new Yankee Stadium, with Alec Baldwin!—he got his at the same day and everything.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Shorter — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Al Chez
about_quotes.evidence: We would get a script and it would say Alec Baldwin is the first guest... Alec Baldwin likes classical music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Chez interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, February 13, 2019
